Lefts

Rights

C none
AND none
OR 35-7 24-6 13-5 02-4 71-3 60-2 57-1 length 7

AND-NOT none
OR-NOT none

Left longest: 2
Right longest: 7

Left winner: I win, C none, AND none, OR lost, XOR none, AND-NOT none, OR-NOT none
Right winner: I none, C none, AND none, OR win, XOR none, AND-NOT none, OR-NOT none

Longest Left: I 4-0 5-1
Longest Right: OR 35-7 24-6 13-5 02-4 71-3 60-2 57-1

7 + 2 = 9 > 8
Left will be truncated to length 8 - 7 = 1

Truncated left: I 4-0 truncated
Truncated right: OR 35-7 24-6 13-5 02-4 71-3 60-2 57-1

Tentative from right

0 I 4

Preferred from left
0 I 4
1 OR 57
2 OR 60

5 OR 13
6 OR 24
7 OR 35

Matched
0 I 4
1 OR 57
2 OR 60
3 OR 71
4 OR 02
5 OR 13
6 OR 24
7 OR 35

Applying to 00000011
Input
I 0 = 0
I 1 = 0
I 2 = 0
I 3 = 0
I 4 = 0
I 5 = 0
I 6 = 1
I 7 = 1
Output
0 I 4 = 0
1 OR 57 = OR(I 5,I 7) = OR(0,1) = 1
2 OR 60 = OR(I 6,I 0) = OR(1,0) = 1
3 OR 71 = OR(I 7,I 1) = OR(1,0) = 1
4 OR 02 = OR(I 0,I 2) = OR(0,0) = 0
5 OR 13 = OR(I 1,I 3) = OR(0,0) = 0
6 OR 24 = OR(I 2,I 4) = OR(0,0) = 0
7 OR 35 = OR(I 3,I 5) = OR(0,0) = 0

\boxed{01110000}
